calendar.matters:
DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jun-05-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-20-2026 Continued To Jun-05-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff First Bank appearing represented by Steven Casselberry, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Seth Bernstein dba Bernstein Construction not appearing.

The court informs Mr. Casselberry that a witness most knowledgable will be required to testify for a default judgment to be entered.

The court continues this matter to June 5, 2026 at 9:00am to give Mr. Casselberry an oppertunity to provide this department with courtesy copies.

Upon review of the presented pleadings, Judge Tong has stated she will sign the judgment without witness testimony if the Mr. Casselberry corrects the flaws on the prepared judgment.

If Mr. Casselberry can submit this department with a corrected judgment for the court's review, the June 5, 2026 hearing can go off calendar.
